rationale.R1.6: The writing is clear and concise with minor rephrasing but no cosmetic issues.
rationale.RX.1: All output is presented as confident without any uncertainty disclosed, though this was not required by the task.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
